//: AGENT-MCP-3 (cross-rail, pre-auth, checkpoint-anchored — PRD §4/§9/§11/§12 D8). ONE $5 cap metered across TWO payment rails (a stripe-ish and an x402-ish downstream). The combined SETTLED total is the verifier-held monotonic counter keyed to the agent delegation; each paid call RESERVES a ceiling before the rail is touched and SETTLES the actual after, releasing the slack. The call that would reserve PAST the cap on the SECOND rail is refused usage-cap-exceeded even though a per-rail-siloed budget would each still read in-budget. Each receipt carries the running CROSS-RAIL total (with the rail it settled on). Frozen replay (PRD §7).

calls.//slack: reserved a $2.00 ceiling, settled $1.50 — the $0.50 slack is RELEASED, not permanently consumed

calls.//moat: this call reserves to $5.10 ACROSS rails; a per-rail-siloed x402 budget reads only $1.50 spent and would WAVE IT THROUGH — the cross-rail counter refuses before the rail is touched, and the metered downstream is NOT charged
